title: Theo's Family Hugs
synopsis: Baby Theo counts from one to five as he receives warm hugs from different family members throughout his day, creating a soothing counting adventure filled with love and family bonds.

illustration.description: A smiling Black toddler boy Theo with soft curly hair wearing a yellow onesie being hugged by his loving Mama, a young Black woman with natural hair in a bright kitchen. Warm morning sunlight streams through windows. Soft watercolor style with gentle yellows and peach tones.
illustration.alt: Theo getting a hug from Mama in the kitchen

illustration.description: Theo now being hugged by both Mama and Daddy, a tall Black man with a gentle beard wearing a soft blue shirt. They form a cozy family huddle in the living room with pastel green walls and a colorful rug. All three faces show pure joy and contentment.
illustration.alt: Theo getting hugs from both parents

illustration.description: Theo surrounded by Mama, Daddy, and Grandma, an older Black woman with silver-streaked hair wearing a lavender cardigan and warm smile. They're gathered on a plush sofa with soft cream and pink cushions. The scene radiates warmth and multi-generational love.
illustration.alt: Theo getting hugs from parents and grandma

pages.text: Four cozy hugs! Big sister says 'yay!'

illustration.description: The family group now includes Zara, Theo's 4-year-old sister with braided hair and a bright pink dress, joining the family hug circle. All five family members create a beautiful huddle in their sunny living room with toys scattered nearby and plants on windowsills.
illustration.alt: Theo getting hugs from whole family including sister

pages.text: Five snugly hugs! Baby Theo giggles 'hee-hee!'

illustration.description: The complete family plus their neighbor Mrs. Chen, an elderly Asian woman with kind eyes and a teal sweater, all embracing little Theo in the center. Theo's face beams with pure happiness as he laughs. The room glows with golden afternoon light and love.
illustration.alt: Theo getting hugs from extended family

pages.text: Count with Theo! One, two, three...

illustration.description: Theo sitting contentedly surrounded by all his loved ones in a semi-circle, each holding up fingers to count. Colorful number blocks (1-5) are scattered on the floor. The scene has a dreamy, soft focus quality with pastel rainbow colors in the background.

pages.text: Four, five! Hugs make everything nice!

illustration.description: A final group embrace as the sun sets through the window, casting everything in warm golden and orange hues. All the family members are snuggled together with Theo in the center, everyone's faces peaceful and content. Soft shadows create a cozy, sleepy-time atmosphere.
illustration.alt: Final family hug as day ends

pages.text: Night-night hugs! Sweet dreams, little one.

illustration.description: Theo peacefully sleeping in his crib with a soft blue blanket, surrounded by stuffed animals representing each family member who hugged him. A gentle nightlight casts star patterns on the walls in soft purples and blues. The room feels safe and loved.
illustration.alt: Theo sleeping peacefully after his day of hugs

metadata.illustrationStyle: Soft, rounded shapes with warm pastel colors. Gentle watercolor feel. Large, friendly faces. High contrast for baby eyes. Simple backgrounds.

questions.question: Who gave Theo the first hug?
questions.explanation: Mama gave Theo the first hug and said 'squeeze!'

questions.question: How many hugs did Theo count?
questions.explanation: Theo counted up to five hugs from all his family members!

questions.question: What sound did Theo make when he was happy?
questions.explanation: Theo giggled 'hee-hee!' when he got five snugly hugs!
